title: Can Kaworu be female at all
display_title: Can Kaworu be female at all
wikitext:
[]: Can Kaworu be female at all? Post by Kjesta » Tue Jan 30, 2007 12:20 pm Hi there! This is something that really got me thinking for some time, so please no one hit me for asking this. Can Kaworu be female? I mean, I personally always saw him as a boy - until I came across the theory that Adam must be female ("our mother" or something along the lines) and, since Kaworu has Adam's soul, he/she/whatever must be female as well. (I'll call Kaworu "him" out of convenience, too lazy to type the .../she/etc every time.) Sounds pretty logical at first, and even though I don't like the thought of Kaworu being female, it's convincing. But I ended up asking myself if, just because he has Adam's soul, he has to be of his/her gender. I mean, does a soul itself even have a gender? That's the point where I'm always getting a knot in my brain. Does a soul have a gender? A soul is, in my views, your very basic self, your innermost emotions and feelings, the core of your being. But are any of those feelings (a certain kindness, joy of life, strong selfishness, whatever) male or female? That's what I'm getting at. You're told what's male and what's female by the community, by the people around you. Let's imagine there weren't those stereotypes, let's just imagine there are no differences made between male and female except the bodily diversity. A soul has no genitalia = it has no gender. So far, so good. I don't think Adam was a being that had a concept of being female. It (I'm saying it, out of convenienve again) just existed. Thus, its soul would also be untouched by people's views of genders. If said soul, unaffected by the concepts of male and female, came to be put into a human body (and I am of the opinion that Kaworu has always been a boy, I personally don't think he has another form as well) and was raised as a male - doesn't that make it male in way? Maybe Kaworu hasn't seen much of the world (we don't know how he spent his earlier life before he was sent to NERV, after all), but he's most certainly been treated as a male being. He's wearing male clothes ('course, what else), his whole posture is rather male (I don't see many girls standing around like that, hands always in his pockets and such) and so on. He has a male voice, a male body. (And I'm sure Shinji would've reacted quite strongly if he hadn't - he'd been showering with him, he'd have freaked if Kaworu didn't have a male body.) All the things around him told him he was a male being. Thus, even if Adam was female, (which I'm not too sure of - I see "mother" as more of a title, as a thing you call what everything comes from [as it is in certain cultures], not necessarily a definition of gender) this doesn't necessarily make Kaworu female. Just thought I'd share my thoughts about it. What's your opinion on this? And I'm very sorry for my English - it's not my mother tongue and I feel like I've been repeating myself quite often because I don't know enough words :oops: ~*Kjesta*~

[]: Post by Res Novae » Tue Jan 30, 2007 1:53 pm In my opinion, Kaworu is male. Generally, a soul does not have reproductive organs, so even if we assume Adam is a female, Kaworu's body is not Adam's body. They may be the same person on a spiritual level, but it's as simple as that.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 30, 2007 1:59 pm One of us! One of us! You appear to be the third independent case of coming to this idea.

[]: Post by Kjesta » Tue Jan 30, 2007 2:10 pm In my opinion, Kaworu is male. Generally, a soul does not have reproductive organs, so even if we assume Adam is a female, Kaworu's body is not Adam's body. They may be the same person on a spiritual level, but it's as simple as that.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 30, 2007 2:18 pm Kjesta wrote: But, hey, I had no idea I'm not the only one. Who's the third one, if I may ask?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 30, 2007 2:50 pm Tines or Reichu, please direct this topic to the most relevent thread. I don't care enough about this topic to look. :P

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 30, 2007 3:02 pm The obvious thread http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1894 is locked. Try here http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2208 as second best.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:42 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The obvious thread http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1894 is locked.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 31, 2007 6:59 am So why does this one need to be locked?
